member.name: T:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Platforms.Android.AndroidUsbDetector
member.summary: Android implementation of USB detection using USB OTG (On-The-Go). Detects external USB drives connected via USB-C or micro-USB adapters. Requires READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE and WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE permissions.

member.name: M:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Platforms.Android.AndroidUsbDetector.GetRemovableDrives
member.summary: Enumerates all currently mounted removable USB drives. Uses StorageManager reflection to access volume paths (Android doesn't expose this publicly).

member.name: M:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Platforms.Android.AndroidUsbDetector.IsValidRemovableDrive(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a path is a valid, currently-mounted removable drive.

member.name: M:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Platforms.Android.AndroidUsbDetector.GetDriveInfo(System.String)
member.summary: Gets drive information for a removable USB drive.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Platforms.Android.AndroidUsbDetector.UsbReceiver
member.summary: Broadcast receiver for USB device attach/detach events.

member.name: T:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Platforms.Android.EmulatorDetector
member.summary: Detects if running on Android emulator with detailed information

member.name: M:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Platforms.Android.EmulatorDetector.IsEmulator
member.summary: Check if running on any Android emulator

member.name: M:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Platforms.Android.EmulatorDetector.IsGenericEmulator
member.summary: Check for generic Android emulator

member.name: M:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Platforms.Android.EmulatorDetector.IsGoogleEmulator
member.summary: Check for Google Android Emulator (AVD)

member.name: M:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Platforms.Android.EmulatorDetector.IsGenymotion
member.summary: Check for Genymotion emulator

member.name: M:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Platforms.Android.EmulatorDetector.IsBluestacks
member.summary: Check for Bluestacks emulator

member.name: M:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Platforms.Android.EmulatorDetector.GetEmulatorType
member.summary: Get emulator type name

member.name: M:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Platforms.Android.EmulatorDetector.GetDetailedInfo
member.summary: Get detailed device information

member.name: M:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Platforms.Android.EmulatorDetector.LogDeviceInfo
member.summary: Log device information for debugging

member.name: T:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Services.MobileDeveloperMode
member.summary: Developer mode configuration for PhantomVault Mobile Provides bypass options for testing on Android emulators

member.name: P:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Services.MobileDeveloperMode.IsEnabled
member.summary: Enable developer mode for mobile vault testing Automatically enabled in DEBUG builds on emulators

member.name: P:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Services.MobileDeveloperMode.DeveloperVaultPath
member.summary: Developer vault path (mobile storage)

member.name: P:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Services.MobileDeveloperMode.DeveloperUsbPath
member.summary: Developer USB path (simulated USB for emulator testing)

member.name: F:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Services.MobileDeveloperMode.DeveloperMasterPassword
member.summary: Default master password for developer mode

member.name: F:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Services.MobileDeveloperMode.DeveloperPin
member.summary: Default PIN for developer mode

member.name: P:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Services.MobileDeveloperMode.SkipUsbBindingCheck
member.summary: Skip USB binding checks in developer mode

member.name: P:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Services.MobileDeveloperMode.SkipBiometricAuth
member.summary: Skip biometric authentication in developer mode

member.name: P:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Services.MobileDeveloperMode.AutoCreateVault
member.summary: Auto-create vault structure in developer mode

member.name: P:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Services.MobileDeveloperMode.BypassPhantomKey
member.summary: Bypass PhantomKey requirement (for emulator testing)

member.name: P:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Services.MobileDeveloperMode.VerboseLogging
member.summary: Verbose logging in developer mode

member.name: P:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Services.MobileDeveloperMode.IsAndroidEmulator
member.summary: Check if running on Android emulator

member.name: M:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Services.MobileDeveloperMode.AutoConfigureForEmulator
member.summary: Auto-enable developer mode on emulators in DEBUG builds

member.name: M:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Services.MobileDeveloperMode.GetDeveloperLaunchOptions
member.summary: Gets developer mode launch options

member.name: M:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Services.MobileDeveloperMode.CleanupDeveloperData
member.summary: Cleans up developer mode data

member.name: M:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Services.MobileDeveloperMode.Log(System.String)
member.summary: Logs a message in developer mode

member.name: M:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.Services.MobileDeveloperMode.GetDeviceInfo
member.summary: Get device information for debugging

member.name: T:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.ViewModels.VaultUnlockViewModel
member.summary: ViewModel for the mobile vault unlock page. Handles USB drive detection, password entry, biometric authentication, and vault decryption on mobile platforms (Android and iOS).

member.name: M:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.ViewModels.VaultUnlockViewModel.UnlockWithDeveloperBypass
member.summary: Developer bypass method for emulator testing

member.name: F:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.ViewModels.VaultUnlockViewModel.togglePasswordVisibilityCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.ViewModels.VaultUnlockViewModel.TogglePasswordVisibilityCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.ViewModels.VaultUnlockViewModel.browseDriveCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.ViewModels.VaultUnlockViewModel.BrowseDriveCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.ViewModels.VaultUnlockViewModel.browseKeyfileCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.ViewModels.VaultUnlockViewModel.BrowseKeyfileCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:PhantomVault.UI.Mobile.ViewModels.VaultUnlockViewModel.DriveSelectedCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.summary: The backing field for .

member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.summary: The backing field for .

member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: T:CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel.__Internals.__KnownINotifyPropertyChangingArgs
member.summary: A helper type providing cached, reusable instances for all properties generated with .

member.summary: The cached instance for all "AvailableDrives" generated properties.
